<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Use it</h3><a id="user-content-use-it" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Use it" href="#use-it"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Open a terminal in your project and run:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>gsd</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">GSD opens an interactive agent session. From there, you have two ways to work:</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>/gsd</code> — step mode.</strong> Type <code>/gsd</code> and GSD executes one unit of work at a time, pausing between each with a wizard showing what completed and what's next. Same state machine as auto mode, but you stay in the loop. No project yet? It starts the discussion flow. Roadmap exists? It plans or executes the next step.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>/gsd auto</code> — autonomous mode.</strong> Type <code>/gsd auto</code> and walk away. GSD researches, plans, executes, verifies, commits, and advances through every slice until the milestone is complete. Fresh context window per task. No babysitting.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Two terminals, one project</h3><a id="user-content-two-terminals-one-project" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Two terminals, one project" href="#two-terminals-one-project"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The real workflow: run auto mode in one terminal, steer from another.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Terminal 1 — let it build</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>gsd

<p dir="auto">Both terminals read and write the same <code>.gsd/</code> files on disk. Your decisions in terminal 2 are picked up automatically at the next phase boundary — no need to stop auto mode.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Headless mode — CI and scripts</h3><a id="user-content-headless-mode--ci-and-scripts" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Headless mode — CI and scripts" href="#headless-mode--ci-and-scripts"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>gsd headless</code> runs any <code>/gsd</code> command without a TUI. Designed for CI pipelines, cron jobs, and scripted automation.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Run auto mode in CI</span>
gsd headless --timeout 600000

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Create and execute a milestone end-to-end</span>
gsd headless new-milestone --context spec.md --auto

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> One unit at a time (cron-friendly)</span>
gsd headless next

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Instant JSON snapshot (no LLM, ~50ms)</span>
gsd headless query

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Force a specific pipeline phase</span>
gsd headless dispatch plan</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Run auto mode in CI
gsd headless --timeout 600000

# Create and execute a milestone end-to-end
gsd headless new-milestone --context spec.md --auto

# One unit at a time (cron-friendly)
gsd headless next

# Instant JSON snapshot (no LLM, ~50ms)
gsd headless query

# Force a specific pipeline phase
gsd headless dispatch plan" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div></div>
<p dir="auto">Headless auto-responds to interactive prompts, detects completion, and exits with structured codes: <code>0</code> complete, <code>1</code> error/timeout, <code>2</code> blocked. Auto-restarts on crash with exponential backoff. Use <code>gsd headless query</code> for instant, machine-readable state inspection — returns phase, next dispatch preview, and parallel worker costs as a single JSON object without spawning an LLM session. Pair with <a href="/gsd-build/gsd-2/blob/main/docs/remote-questions.md">remote questions</a> to route decisions to Slack or Discord when human input is needed.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Multi-session orchestration</strong> — headless mode supports file-based IPC in <code>.gsd/parallel/</code> for coordinating multiple GSD workers across milestones. Build orchestrators that spawn, monitor, and budget-cap a fleet of GSD workers.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">First launch</h3><a id="user-content-first-launch" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: First launch" href="#first-launch"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">On first run, GSD launches a branded setup wizard that walks you through LLM provider selection (OAuth or API key), then optional tool API keys (Brave Search, Context7, Jina, Slack, Discord). Every step is skippable — press Enter to skip any. If you have an existing Pi installation, your provider credentials (LLM and tool keys) are imported automatically. Run <code>gsd config</code> anytime to re-run the wizard.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Commands</h3><a id="user-content-commands" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Commands" href="#commands"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Alt+V</code></td>
<td>Paste clipboard image (macOS)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd config</code></td>
<td>Re-run the setup wizard (LLM provider + tool keys)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd update</code></td>
<td>Update GSD to the latest version</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd headless [cmd]</code></td>
<td>Run <code>/gsd</code> commands without TUI (CI, cron, scripts)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd headless query</code></td>
<td>Instant JSON snapshot — state, next dispatch, costs (no LLM)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd --continue</code> (<code>-c</code>)</td>
<td>Resume the most recent session for the current directory</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd --worktree</code> (<code>-w</code>)</td>
<td>Launch an isolated worktree session for the active milestone</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>gsd sessions</code></td>
<td>Interactive session picker — browse and resume any saved session</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">What GSD Manages For You</h2><a id="user-content-what-gsd-manages-for-you" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: What GSD Manages For You" href="#what-gsd-manages-for-you"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Context Engineering</h3><a id="user-content-context-engineering" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Context Engineering" href="#context-engineering"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Git Strategy</h3><a id="user-content-git-strategy" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Git Strategy" href="#git-strategy"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Branch-per-slice with squash merge. Fully automated.</p>

<p dir="auto">One squash commit per milestone on main (or whichever branch you started from). The worktree is torn down after merge. Git bisect works. Individual milestones are revertable. Commit messages are generated from task summaries — no more generic "complete task" messages.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Verification</h3><a id="user-content-verification" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Verification" href="#verification"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Every task has must-haves — mechanically checkable outcomes:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Truths</strong> — Observable behaviors ("User can sign up with email")</li>
<li><strong>Artifacts</strong> — Files that must exist with real implementation, not stubs</li>
<li><strong>Key Links</strong> — Imports and wiring between artifacts</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">The verification ladder: static checks → command execution → behavioral testing → human review (only when the agent genuinely can't verify itself).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Dashboard</h3><a id="user-content-dashboard" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Dashboard" href="#dashboard"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>Ctrl+Alt+G</code> or <code>/gsd status</code> opens a real-time overlay showing:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Current milestone, slice, and task progress</li>
<li>Auto mode elapsed time and phase</li>
<li>Per-unit cost and token breakdown by phase, slice, and model</li>
<li>Cost projections based on completed work</li>
<li>Completed and in-progress units</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">HTML Reports</h3><a id="user-content-html-reports" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: HTML Reports" href="#html-reports"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">After a milestone completes, GSD auto-generates a self-contained HTML report in <code>.gsd/reports/</code>. Each report includes project summary, progress tree, slice dependency graph (SVG DAG), cost/token metrics with bar charts, execution timeline, changelog, and knowledge base sections. No external dependencies — all CSS and JS are inlined, printable to PDF from any browser.</p>
<p dir="auto">An auto-generated <code>index.html</code> shows all reports with progression metrics across milestones.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Automatic</strong> — generated after milestone completion (configurable via <code>auto_report</code> preference)</li>
<li><strong>Manual</strong> — run <code>/gsd export --html</code> anytime</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Configuration</h2><a id="user-content-configuration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Configuration" href="#configuration"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Preferences</h3><a id="user-content-preferences" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Preferences" href="#preferences"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">GSD preferences live in <code>~/.gsd/PREFERENCES.md</code> (global) or <code>.gsd/PREFERENCES.md</code> (project). Manage with <code>/gsd prefs</code>.</p>

  <span class="pl-ent">planning</span>:

    <span class="pl-ent">fallbacks</span>:

  <span class="pl-ent">completion</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude-sonnet-4-6</span>
<span class="pl-ent">skill_discovery</span>: <span class="pl-s">suggest</span>
<span class="pl-ent">auto_supervisor</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">soft_timeout_minutes</span>: <span class="pl-c1">20</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">idle_timeout_minutes</span>: <span class="pl-c1">10</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">hard_timeout_minutes</span>: <span class="pl-c1">30</span>
<span class="pl-ent">budget_ceiling</span>: <span class="pl-c1">50.00</span>

---</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Key settings:</strong></p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Setting</th>
<th>What it controls</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>models.*</code></td>
<td>Per-phase model selection — string for a single model, or <code>{model, fallbacks}</code> for automatic failover</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill_discovery</code></td>
<td><code>auto</code> / <code>suggest</code> / <code>off</code> — how GSD finds and applies skills</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>auto_supervisor.*</code></td>
<td>Timeout thresholds for auto mode supervision</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>budget_ceiling</code></td>
<td>USD ceiling — auto mode pauses when reached</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>uat_dispatch</code></td>
<td>Enable automatic UAT runs after slice completion</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>always_use_skills</code></td>
<td>Skills to always load when relevant</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill_rules</code></td>
<td>Situational rules for skill routing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>skill_staleness_days</code></td>
<td>Skills unused for N days get deprioritized (default: 60, 0 = disabled)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>unique_milestone_ids</code></td>
<td>Uses unique milestone names to avoid clashes when working in teams of people</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>git.isolation</code></td>
<td><code>none</code> (default), <code>worktree</code>, or <code>branch</code> — enable worktree or branch isolation for milestone work</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>git.manage_gitignore</code></td>
<td>Set <code>false</code> to prevent GSD from modifying <code>.gitignore</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>verification_commands</code></td>
<td>Array of shell commands to run after task execution (e.g., <code>["npm run lint", "npm run test"]</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>verification_auto_fix</code></td>
<td>Auto-retry on verification failures (default: true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>verification_max_retries</code></td>
<td>Max retries for verification failures (default: 2)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>require_slice_discussion</code></td>
<td>Pause auto-mode before each slice for human discussion review</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>auto_report</code></td>
<td>Auto-generate HTML reports after milestone completion (default: true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>searchExcludeDirs</code></td>
<td>Directories to exclude from <code>@</code> file autocomplete (e.g., <code>["node_modules", ".git", "dist"]</code>)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Agent Instructions</h3><a id="user-content-agent-instructions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Agent Instructions" href="#agent-instructions"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Place an <code>AGENTS.md</code> file in any directory to provide persistent behavioral guidance for that scope. Pi core loads <code>AGENTS.md</code> automatically (with <code>CLAUDE.md</code> as a fallback) at both user and project levels. Use these files for coding standards, architectural decisions, domain terminology, or workflow preferences.</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Note:</strong> The legacy <code>agent-instructions.md</code> format (<code>~/.gsd/agent-instructions.md</code> and <code>.gsd/agent-instructions.md</code>) is deprecated and no longer loaded. Migrate any existing instructions to <code>AGENTS.md</code> or <code>CLAUDE.md</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Debug Mode</h3><a id="user-content-debug-mode" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Debug Mode" href="#debug-mode"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Start GSD with <code>gsd --debug</code> to enable structured JSONL diagnostic logging. Debug logs capture dispatch decisions, state transitions, and timing data for troubleshooting auto-mode issues.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Token Optimization</h3><a id="user-content-token-optimization" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Token Optimization" href="#token-optimization"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">GSD includes a coordinated token optimization system that reduces usage by 40-60% on cost-sensitive workloads. Set a single preference to coordinate model selection, phase skipping, and context compression:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">token_profile</span>: <span class="pl-s">budget      </span><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> or balanced (default), quality</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Profile</th>
<th>Savings</th>
<th>What It Does</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>budget</code></td>
<td>40-60%</td>
<td>Cheap models, skip research/reassess, minimal context inlining</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>balanced</code></td>
<td>10-20%</td>
<td>Default models, skip slice research, standard context</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>quality</code></td>
<td>0%</td>
<td>All phases, all context, full model power</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Complexity-based routing</strong> automatically classifies tasks as simple/standard/complex and routes to appropriate models. Simple docs tasks get Haiku; complex architectural work gets Opus. The classification is heuristic (sub-millisecond, no LLM calls) and learns from outcomes via a persistent routing history.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Budget pressure</strong> graduates model downgrading as you approach your budget ceiling — 50%, 75%, and 90% thresholds progressively shift work to cheaper tiers.</p>
<p dir="auto">See the full <a href="/gsd-build/gsd-2/blob/main/docs/token-optimization.md">Token Optimization Guide</a> for details.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bundled Tools</h3><a id="user-content-bundled-tools" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bundled Tools" href="#bundled-tools"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Working in teams</h2><a id="user-content-working-in-teams" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Working in teams" href="#working-in-teams"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The best practice for working in teams is to ensure unique milestone names across all branches (by using <code>unique_milestone_ids</code>) and checking in the right <code>.gsd/</code> artifacts to share valuable context between teammates.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Suggested .gitignore setup</h3><a id="user-content-suggested-gitignore-setup" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Suggested .gitignore setup" href="#suggested-gitignore-setup"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Unique Milestone Names</h3><a id="user-content-unique-milestone-names" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Unique Milestone Names" href="#unique-milestone-names"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Create or amend your <code>.gsd/PREFERENCES.md</code> file within the repo to include <code>unique_milestone_ids: true</code> e.g.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-md notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-s">---</span>
<span class="pl-ent">version</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>
<span class="pl-ent">unique_milestone_ids</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>
<span class="pl-s">---</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

version: 1
unique_milestone_ids: true
---" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

<p dir="auto">With the above <code>.gitignore</code> set up, the <code>.gsd/PREFERENCES.md</code> file is checked into the repo ensuring all teammates use unique milestone names to avoid collisions.</p>
<p dir="auto">Milestone names will now be generated with a 6 char random string appended e.g. instead of <code>M001</code> you'll get something like <code>M001-ush8s3</code></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Migrating an existing git ignored <code>.gsd/</code> folder</h3><a id="user-content-migrating-an-existing-git-ignored-gsd-folder" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Migrating an existing git ignored .gsd/ folder" href="#migrating-an-existing-git-ignored-gsd-folder"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Ensure you are not in the middle of any milestones (clean state)</li>
<li>Update the <code>.gsd/</code> related entries in your <code>.gitignore</code> to follow the <code>Suggested .gitignore setup</code> section under <code>Working in teams</code> (ensure you are no longer blanket ignoring the whole <code>.gsd/</code> directory)</li>
<li>Update your <code>.gsd/PREFERENCES.md</code> file within the repo as per section <code>Unique Milestone Names</code></li>
<li>If you want to update all your existing milestones use this prompt in GSD: <code>I have turned on unique milestone ids, please update all old milestone ids to use this new format e.g. M001-abc123 where abc123 is a random 6 char lowercase alpha numeric string. Update all references in all .gsd file contents, file names and directory names. Validate your work once done to ensure referential integrity.</code></li>
<li>Commit to git</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture" href="#architecture"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">GSD is a TypeScript application that embeds the Pi coding agent SDK.</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>gsd (CLI binary)
  └─ loader.ts          Sets PI_PACKAGE_DIR, GSD env vars, dynamic-imports cli.ts
      └─ cli.ts         Wires SDK managers, loads extensions, starts InteractiveMode
          ├─ headless.ts     Headless orchestrator (spawns RPC child, auto-responds, detects completion)
          ├─ onboarding.ts   First-run setup wizard (LLM provider + tool keys)
          ├─ wizard.ts       Env hydration from stored auth.json credentials
          ├─ app-paths.ts    ~/.gsd/agent/, ~/.gsd/sessions/, auth.json
          ├─ resource-loader.ts  Syncs bundled extensions + agents to ~/.gsd/agent/
          └─ src/resources/
              ├─ extensions/gsd/    Core GSD extension (auto, state, commands, ...)
              ├─ extensions/...     18 supporting extensions
              ├─ agents/            scout, researcher, worker
              ├─ AGENTS.md          Agent routing instructions
              └─ GSD-WORKFLOW.md    Manual bootstrap protocol
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="gsd (CLI binary)
  └─ loader.ts          Sets PI_PACKAGE_DIR, GSD env vars, dynamic-imports cli.ts
      └─ cli.ts         Wires SDK managers, loads extensions, starts InteractiveMode
          ├─ headless.ts     Headless orchestrator (spawns RPC child, auto-responds, detects completion)
          ├─ onboarding.ts   First-run setup wizard (LLM provider + tool keys)
          ├─ wizard.ts       Env hydration from stored auth.json credentials
          ├─ app-paths.ts    ~/.gsd/agent/, ~/.gsd/sessions/, auth.json
          ├─ resource-loader.ts  Syncs bundled extensions + agents to ~/.gsd/agent/
          └─ src/resources/
              ├─ extensions/gsd/    Core GSD extension (auto, state, commands, ...)
              ├─ extensions/...     18 supporting extensions
              ├─ agents/            scout, researcher, worker
              ├─ AGENTS.md          Agent routing instructions
              └─ GSD-WORKFLOW.md    Manual bootstrap protocol" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Key design decisions:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong><code>pkg/</code> shim directory</strong> — <code>PI_PACKAGE_DIR</code> points here (not project root) to avoid Pi's theme resolution collision with our <code>src/</code> directory. Contains only <code>piConfig</code> and theme assets.</li>
<li><strong>Two-file loader pattern</strong> — <code>loader.ts</code> sets all env vars with zero SDK imports, then dynamic-imports <code>cli.ts</code> which does static SDK imports. This ensures <code>PI_PACKAGE_DIR</code> is set before any SDK code evaluates.</li>
<li><strong>Always-overwrite sync</strong> — <code>npm update -g</code> takes effect immediately. Bundled extensions and agents are synced to <code>~/.gsd/agent/</code> on every launch, not just first run.</li>
<li><strong>State lives on disk</strong> — <code>.gsd/</code> is the source of truth. Auto mode reads it, writes it, and advances based on what it finds. No in-memory state survives across sessions.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Requirements</h2><a id="user-content-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Requirements" href="#requirements"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Node.js</strong> ≥ 22.0.0 (24 LTS recommended)</li>
<li><strong>An LLM provider</strong> — any of the 20+ supported providers (see <a href="#use-any-model">Use Any Model</a>)</li>
<li><strong>Git</strong> — initialized automatically if missing</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Optional:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Brave Search API key (web research)</li>
<li>Tavily API key (web research — alternative to Brave)</li>
<li>Google Gemini API key (web research via Gemini Search grounding)</li>
<li>Context7 API key (library docs)</li>
<li>Jina API key (page extraction)</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Use Any Model</h2><a id="user-content-use-any-model" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Use Any Model" href="#use-any-model"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">GSD isn't locked to one provider. It runs on the <a href="https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono">Pi SDK</a>, which supports <strong>20+ model providers</strong> out of the box. Use different models for different phases — Opus for planning, Sonnet for execution, a fast model for research.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Built-in Providers</h3><a id="user-content-built-in-providers" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Built-in Providers" href="#built-in-providers"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Anthropic, Anthropic (Vertex AI), OpenAI, Google (Gemini), OpenRouter, GitHub Copilot, Amazon Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Google Vertex, Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, xAI, HuggingFace, Vercel AI Gateway, and more.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OAuth / Max Plans</h3><a id="user-content-oauth--max-plans" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OAuth / Max Plans" href="#oauth--max-plans"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you have a <strong>Claude Max</strong>, <strong>Codex</strong>, or <strong>GitHub Copilot</strong> subscription, you can use those directly — Pi handles the OAuth flow. No API key needed.</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong><g-emoji class="g-emoji" alias="warning">⚠️</g-emoji> Important:</strong> Using OAuth tokens from subscription plans outside their native applications may violate the provider's Terms of Service. In particular:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Google Gemini</strong> — Using Gemini CLI or Antigravity OAuth tokens in third-party tools has resulted in <strong>Google account suspensions</strong>. This affects your entire Google account, not just the Gemini service. <strong>Use a Gemini API key instead.</strong></li>
<li><strong>Claude Max</strong> — Anthropic's ToS may not explicitly permit OAuth use outside Claude's own applications.</li>
<li><strong>GitHub Copilot</strong> — Usage outside GitHub's own tools may be restricted by your subscription terms.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">GSD supports API key authentication for all providers as the safe alternative. <strong>We strongly recommend using API keys over OAuth for Google Gemini.</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">OpenRouter</h3><a id="user-content-openrouter" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: OpenRouter" href="#openrouter"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://openrouter.ai" rel="nofollow">OpenRouter</a> gives you access to hundreds of models through a single API key. Use it to run GSD with Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, or anything else OpenRouter supports.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Per-Phase Model Selection</h3><a id="user-content-per-phase-model-selection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Per-Phase Model Selection" href="#per-phase-model-selection"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">In your preferences (<code>/gsd prefs</code>), assign different models to different phases:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-yaml notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-ent">models</span>:
  <span class="pl-ent">research</span>: <span class="pl-s">openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-r1</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">planning</span>:
    <span class="pl-ent">model</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude-opus-4-6</span>
    <span class="pl-ent">fallbacks</span>:
      - <span class="pl-s">openrouter/z-ai/glm-5</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">execution</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude-sonnet-4-6</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">completion</span>: <span class="pl-s">claude-sonnet-4-6</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="models:
  research: openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-r1
  planning:
    model: claude-opus-4-6
    fallbacks:
      - openrouter/z-ai/glm-5
  execution: claude-sonnet-4-6
  completion: claude-sonnet-4-6" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Use expensive models where quality matters (planning, complex execution) and cheaper/faster models where speed matters (research, simple completions). Each phase accepts a simple model string or an object with <code>model</code> and <code>fallbacks</code> — if the primary model fails (provider outage, rate limit, credit exhaustion), GSD automatically tries the next fallback. GSD tracks cost per-model so you can see exactly where your budget goes.</p>
